_comment: Notion property schema for the AI 50 Run Log database. Added in v1.2.0. One row per Routine fire, capturing version, counts, errors, and token/cost metrics. Sortable + filterable for time-series debugging ('which run added Cyera as broken?', 'when did 403s start on Botify?', 'which versions ran in the last 30 days?'). Used by setup wizard for first-time creation AND by jobs-run for runtime auto-creation when discover returns no run_log_database_id (existing-installs migration path). Body of each row carries the full structured banner verbatim so opening a row gives the same view as the run-time output.
_versioning_note: Status select options + property names are pinned. Adding new properties is forward-compatible (older runs have null for new fields). Removing or renaming requires a Notion-side rename + a migration script.
